item.title: Cost to Fix a 1992 Mercedes-Benz 300E
item.description: A look at the repair costs for a beautiful 1992 Mercedes-Benz 300E and what it takes to keep this classic sedan running well.

item.title: Six Vehicles to Watch Out For
item.description: A practical look at six vehicles that may bring ownership and repair challenges, with a focus on maintenance, diagnostics, and long-term reliability.

item.title: 25 Years Wrenching, New AC Problem
item.description: A mechanic with 25 years of experience runs into an AC issue he has never seen before, highlighting real-world diagnostics and repair challenges.

item.title: AC Not Working? How to Isolate the Problem
item.description: Learn a simple way to narrow down AC issues and identify where the problem may be coming from before starting repairs.

item.title: Buick Rainier Battery Drain Diagnosis

item.title: Are Auction Cars a Good Deal?
item.description: A practical look at whether auction cars make sense for buyers, with a focus on value, condition, and the risks to check before bidding.
